title: Aaron McBride

'''Aaron McBride''' is an artist for [[Industrial Light & Magic]]. He wrote and illustrated the Star Wars comic ''[[Old Wounds]]'', featuring the first appearance of a resurrected Darth Maul. He drew the [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku]] cover art for [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] and illustrated the cover for the novels ''[[Lords of the Sith]]'' and ''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]''.

McBride has worked as a concept artist on the films [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'', [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']], and ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]'', as well as [[ILM Immersive]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Secrets of the Empire]]'' and ''[[Vader Immortal – Episode I]]''.

He has contributed ''Star Wars'' designs such as the Summa Verminoth Space Monster, Anakin Skywalker's prosthetic limbs, the [[fathier]] racing beasts, and the [[Vulptex]] of [[Crait]].
